description: JUST LISTED IN THE GUARD GATED COMMUNITY OF SEACLIFF ON THE GREENS!  This 500 model has a desirable corner lot.  Extremely light and bright  with 2298 square feet of living space with 2.5 baths, 2 full bedrooms + loft area and a office.  Master Bedroom has vaulted ceiling, walk-in closet and a separate wardrobe closet. Master bath has just been remodeled with soaking tub, dual sinks and vanity and wall in shower. The other bathrooms are also redone. Central vacuum, shutters thru out and updated window and sliders. There is a sound system thru out home and also on patio.  There is a spacious two car garage with lots of build-in cabinets.  Close proximity to the beach, Pacific City and restaurants.  Within walking distance to The Huntington Club, golf and tennis.  THIS ONE WON'T LAST!!

description: This home is ideal for those who appreciate modern amenities and thoughtful design. With plenty of space to spread out, it's a perfect place to call home. First flr features convenient laundry room, perfect for busy lifestyles, as well as an office, ideal for those who work from home. The dining room is perfect for entertaining guests, while the finished basement provides plenty of additional space for rec or relaxation. The keeping room, adorned with shiplap walls,  is a comfortable space to gather with loved ones, while the family room, central to the home, is complete w/fireplace for chilly evenings. Make your way upstairs to find 2 additional bedrooms offering plenty of space. Both share access to a full bath that has been tastefully updated. The Master Suite includes a walk-in closet and modern en suite full bath. But the real showstopper is the gorgeous inground pool, perfect for enjoying warm weather & outdoor activities. Imagine spending weekends lounging poolside, simply enjoying the peaceful tranquility of your own backyard oasis. This home truly has it all. Don't miss opportunity to live in the home of your dreams! Delay Show 3/17 10AM; Delay Negotiation 3/21 4PM.

description: Welcome to paradise! Caicos Model Villa home in the award-winning Latitude Margaritaville resort style community in the heart of beautiful Daytona Beach, FL.  This well appointed 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom with den Villa features upgrades throughout and includes an open floor plan, spacious kitchen with 42-inch uppers, under cabinet lighting, custom tile backsplash, 9 foot ceilings throughout, high efficiency heating & air, screened in lanai and more.   Latitude Margaritaville is a place where life rolls easy, neighbors are friends, and the party never ends. Awesome recreation, dining and entertainment will make the town center the place to be. You’ve earned a life where every day feels like an escape. Find your paradise at the 55-and-better community where fun and relaxation meet. Escape to Jimmy Buffet's island-inspired living as you grow older, but not up. Top of the line amenities include the private Bar & Chill restaurant, resort style pool, Fins-Up Fitness Center, Outdoor Band Shell, Last Mango Theater, Work & Play Center, Dog Park and Pet Spa, Fitness Trails, Pickleball, Bocce Ball, Tennis Courts, Basketball Courts along with the Private Beach Club. Golf cart community with paths to the Latitude Landing which includes a grocery store,  restaurants, several retail outlets including insurance, hair salon, nail salon, pet boutique, and more. description: Do not miss out on this 2 bedroom, 2 full bathroom condo in Park North at Cheney located in Orlando. The unit has plenty of natural light coming in from the windows and balcony double doors. With a view straight out to the pool area, you won’t even realize you’re downtown. And you can enjoy that view right from your balcony. The condo opens straight into your kitchen and living areas: open and perfect for entertaining. The dining area easily accommodates a full-size dining room table; allowing you plenty of room for guests or formal dinners. The guest bathroom has been tastefully updated, and both bedrooms feature large walk-in closets. The split floor plan features a large primary bedroom toward the rear of the unit, with a large en-suite bathroom, including a soaker tub. And the HVAC (including the air handler and the condenser), refrigerator, microwave and dishwasher were all updated in the last year.  Park North at Cheney place has 2 gorgeous pools, 3 elevators, fitness centers, a business center, laundry, and a very large common area. Fee includes water, sewer, trash collection and reserves. And the location is adjacent to restaurants, shopping and highways.

description: This home is ready for you!  New paint, new windows, new roof (2017) new carpet (7/2021)!  Start living today in this special home that sits on almost one-half acre in a beautiful location in Castlewood Ranch.  The huge, flat, backyard welcomes every guest with a large stamped concrete patio that can host all your friends for beautiful Colorado evenings outside.  There's also a jungle gym, half court basketball court, in-ground fire pit, flowers, vegetable gardens, professional landscaping with Rachio smart sprinkler system and ample side yards.  So many dramatic touches to this home, beginning with the walnut hardwood entry into a 2-story formal living / dining room. Enjoy the light and bright office on the main level along with a beautiful kitchen, dining area and family room that effortlessly flows together for your busy lifestyle! Kitchen includes stainless steel appliances, beautiful maple cabinets, tile floor, granite island with overhang for counter height seating, pantry and desk area. Laundry room with storage and *included washer and dryer* complete the main level! Head upstairs via the double staircase with gorgeous wrought iron railing and you will find 4 bedrooms, including a master-suite with 5-piece bath and closet! Sellers purchased A/C when they moved in, there's a whole house fan and whole house sound system! 2-full bathrooms up, one half-bath on main level for a total of 3 bathrooms. 4,280 total sq. ft., 2,818 finished sq. ft. Basement is unfinished, and has 1,461 sq. ft. ready for your special touches! This one won't last long!

description: Located in it's own cul-de-sac, this beautiful house is perfect for entertaining! On the main level you'll find the kitchen, living room, dining room and three bedrooms plus two full baths. Laminate wood floors flow through the kitchen and dining room. The kitchen has granite counters and upgraded cabinetry. Laundry room is located on the main level as well! Step out onto the deck just off the living room and enjoy your view of West Richland. Take a walk downstairs to the fully finished basement that offers a third living space, full size bath, two huge bedrooms and three additional storage rooms! From the basement you can walk out onto the extended patio and enjoy the private backyard with plenty of shade trees. The side yard offers behind fence parking as well for possible RV or boat storage.

description: Forest Creek stunner. Recently remodeled and nestled on a quiet cul-de-sac, this home has it all. Features include; Private, over-sized lot, new HVAC system, indoor laundry room, gorgeous kitchen with Brazilian granite counter tops with leather finish, stainless steel appliances, and large island with an abundance of storage. This open-concept home also boasts slate floors, designer Masland carpet, 5' baseboards, recessed lighting & plantation shutters throughout, ceiling fans in every bedroom, walk-up attic for endless storage, shelving in garage, plus a newer roof and Simonton windows with transferable warranty. The large backyard has a gated sports pool with spa and toddler pool, new Pentair digital heater and pool pump. Sunny side yard has a large raised bed with irrigation for your own vegetable garden and fruit trees! Neighborhood amenities include membership in the Lake Forest Sun & Sail Club, and sought after Rancho Canada Elementary School.

description: This 3860 square foot single family home has 4 bedrooms and 4.0 bathrooms. This home is located at 12039 NW Blackhawk Dr, Portland, OR 97229.

Nestled on a quiet side street, this colonial has all you're searching for: great curb appeal, large rooms, interchangeable layout, gas heat & cooking, huge primary bedroom with dressing area, two more second floor bedrooms, a bedroom on the first floor, large yard, and located near shops and community pool. Inground sprinklers. 200 amp. Generator ready.

You will fall in love with this beauty in Golf Ridge, on the 11th tee of this desirable community. One level living with a bonus loft on the upper floor. This home has 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms along with a convenient floor plan and first floor laundry. The kitchen has gas cooking and Corian counter tops. Next to the kitchen is a breakfast nook that leads to the rear deck. The formal dining room is great for big meals with family and friends. Gleaming hardwood floors are in the dining room and the living room. The living room also has a gas fireplace and an exit to the rear deck as well. The main bedroom has a vaulted ceiling, en suite with shower and soaking tub, ceramic tile floor and walk-in closet. The loft has 2 walk-in closets, skylights and could be turned into a 3rd bedroom with plenty of room to add a bath if desired. Trees and shrubbery line the rear of property giving added seclusion. Rest assured with the new roof that was installed May 2017, this one will be at the top of your list!

Downstairs there is both a flex space off of the foyer, as well as an activity / task space…great for a home office or play area. The open kitchen w/ granite island, Stainless Steel appliances, and corner pantry connects to the café area and sunlit gathering room. Plenty of space off of the Owner’s entry for a potential mud room or drop zone. Extended patio and Sprinklers / Irrigation are included in home purchase. We include an exceptional 10yr Home Warranty with 5-year water infiltration and leak protection as well as great incentives for working with preferred lender. ...ask for details! This "tucked away" section in Clear Pond offers a unique feel and natural setting...a great location within the community.  Completed Clear Pond amenities include 2 swimming pools, fitness center, playground, clubhouse with kitchen & fireplace, open green space, lake view, and walking paths. This community is conducive to biking, walking, and golf cart rides...a fantastic place to call home! Clear Pond community offers close proximity to everyday shopping, restaurants, recreation, entertainment, outlet malls, and is only 10 miles to the beach. Carolina Forest Schools.  Convenient to both Myrtle Beach and Conway, and is also near medical facilities, Coastal Carolina University, and Horry-Georgetown Tech. description: Nifty for the Thrifty! What a buy! You owe it to yourself to come & check out all the updates in this hilltop home. The exterior offers seamless steel siding, a new roof, newer vinyl windows, nice landscaping & a large double tandem style garage with front & back doors for easy access. There are 3 bedrooms total & 2 full baths in this great split level style. You'll notice brand new flooring as you enter the foyer, go upstairs for a spacious living room, user friendly kitchen, 2 nicely sized bedrooms & a full bath. The living room & bedrooms have new carpeting. The lower level offers large family room with new carpeting, daylight windows & walk-in closet. description: Luxurious and functional, the Brodie plan boasts ample space to suit your lifestyle. An open-concept layout on the main floor features a study off the foyer, and then beyond a well-appointed kitchen—complete with a center island and walk-in pantry—that overlooks an expansive dining and great room area with patio access. The secluded owner's suite sits at the back of the home, providing a spacious retreat with an attached bath and walk-in closet. The second floor features three secondary bedrooms—all with walk-in closets and one with an en-suite bathroom—a large loft area, and a full hall bath.  Options include upgraded carpet and tiling selections, wood-look tiling, Quartz countertops, smart home technology, and MORE! Enjoy fantastic community amenities and lifestyle features at a 2.2 tax rate! No MUD or PID, and just walking distance to the brand new OB Johnson Elementary located within the community! Est. January completion!

description:
Perfectly located Frisco home with close proximity to shopping, eateries, and major roads and highways. Spacious two story home with with nice wood floors and 1 bedroom downstairs. Master + 2 bedrooms upstairs (4 total bedrooms), 2.5 total baths, and a 2 car garage. 2 generous living areas, 1 dining room, and 1 open room that would make a great office area! Recently remodeled open kitchen with loads of cabinet and counter space! Spacious master bedroom with a large, recently remodeled master bath, remodeled closet with wood floors - loads of closet space! Large backyard with two patios, one of which is covered.

Two year lease rate for property is $3,000 with approved application. Smoking in any covered area of the home or on patio is strictly prohibited. Tenants are responsible for utilities, internet, and renters insurance. Yard care will be provided. Pets considered on a case by case basis. All leases participate in the HVAC Filter Maintenance Program at a cost of $25 per month, due with rent.

description: Architecturally designed Prairie style custom home in Northwest Crossing on large lot with sweeping territorial views. Earth Advantage certified home is high and private, and features an open floor plan with gas fireplace and refinished hardwood floors running throughout main living area into the kitchen. The kitchen features custom built-in cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, granite counters, pantry, large cooking island and breakfast nook. The 4th bedroom/study is tucked away on the main floor and has a built-in murphy bed and half bathroom. Upstairs master suite features a full tile shower and separate jetted tub, walk in closet and French doors opening onto a balcony. Upper floor has two additional bedrooms with full bath, and a bright open bonus room with skylights. Exterior features include 400 square feet of mahogany decks, landscaped fenced yard and a 2 car garage with two easy access doors to each floor of the house.

description:
Spectacular waterfront estate Nestled between Bal Harbour and Miami Beach, in exclusive Indian Creek Village. This historically significant waterfront property designed by Maurice Fatio encompasses 80,000 SF of land on which rests an approximately an 8,000 SF home that is exceptional in every way.  Featuring over 200 feet on the water and 70' foot dock. The home sits on one of the best lots on the island. The home captures beautiful views of Biscayne Bay and downtown Miami.

Indian Creek Island is the most exclusive and elegant neighborhood in Florida. Indian Creek Village is a private island comprised of 300 acres, and home to an affluent community with only thirty-two waterfront estates. Also on the island, is the private and exclusive Indian Creek Country Club, which has one of the oldest and beautifully secluded clubhouses in Florida. The Village employs its very own police department, which apart from safeguarding the land, provides 24/7 police, patrol by boat. Currently, the Indian Creek Village Public Safety Department employs 14 (10 Full time & 4 Reserve) sworn law enforcement officers and 4 civilian public service aides.

Location! Location! Location! 2 minutes from I-95 & Rainbow and just as close to dining and shopping. 4 bedrooms, 2 baths and a pool nestled in a charming community. Desirable schools. Brand new tile in kitchen and dining area. New vanity in bathroom, freshly painted and new carpet. Fireplace with stone facade. Spacious rooms. Huge backyard with covered patio and nice tree. Don't think you could build this at this price, especially not with a pool! Call me for your private showing befor...

description:
This beautiful 4bd-2ba-2ga home in Mesquite has been completely renovated! The home has new paint on the interior-exterior and updated landscaping providing a welcoming curb-appeal. Your new home features gorgeous wood vinyl flooring throughout the main areas and plush new carpet in the bedrooms. We have updated the AC system and water heater to insure you are comfortable in the heat of the summer and provide efficiency. Your new kitchen has refinished white cabinets with new modern countertops providing plenty of space for dining at home. 

Your spacious living room and fenced backyard are great for entertaining or relaxing at home. Conveniently located close to shopping and a variety of restaurants. Easy access to major highways.

description: Remodeled just three years ago including a new roof. 2 bedroom, 2.5 bath, 1 car garage, end unit townhouse in a lovely community, Logan's gate. Beautiful kitchen offers white cabinets and quartz countertops including a breakfast bar, stainless appliances, large pantry closet and full size stackable washer/dryer. Nice dining area off the kitchen and a half bath for your guests. Enjoy the wood burning fireplace in the living room. Heavy impact resistant sliding glass doors take you out to the screened lanai and fully fenced yard. This home offers porcelain tiles in the kitchen and baths and dark wood laminate flooring throughout the rest of the home. Upstairs there is a very nice size master bedroom with a wall to wall closet and a master bath with a walk-in shower. The second bedroom is down the hall, also with a large closet, the width of the room. Next to the bedroom is another full bath with a bathtub. Beautiful townhouse with a one car garage in a great community with a beautiful park. NO HOA FEES!

description: This 1152 square foot single family home has 3 bedrooms and 1.0 bathrooms. This home is located at 1524 Van Kirk St, Philadelphia, PA 19149.

Welcome to this stunning 4 bedroom and 3-bathroom home in desirable community of Estancia in Wesley Chapel. This home is only 2 years old, truly has it all and has been maintained very well. The paved driveway and mature & tropical landscaping welcome you to the gorgeous house. This smart home includes updates such as light fixtures, accented walls, beautiful Florida sunroom welcoming you into your own backyard oasis, crown molding throughout the first floor, window trimmings, newly painted garage wall and floors and shelves.   This home has gorgeous lanai area with new porcelain tile floors and glass enclosure, a ceiling fan and a breathtaking view of the pond and adds 200 sq feet to your hangout area. It is a great place to hang out with friends and family or just to enjoy beautiful nature. The elegant home features a dramatic foyer entry, with a turned staircase and walkway along the second floor. The great room is perfect for entertaining. This gourmet kitchen features quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances a great room and soft close cabinetry. The kitchen overlooks the spacious great room which is filled with natural light from the abundant windows and sliding glass doors. On the main level a guest bedroom and full bathroom adds flexibility to the living space. Beautiful wood tread stairs with kick plates lead you upstairs where you will find 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. Master bedroom is huge and has the view of the beautiful pond with big windows, an ensuite Master bathroom that is SPA like! The walk-in shower has tile from floor to ceiling and glass enclosure. Laundry room is located upstairs. The spacious loft offers additional living space to this home. House boasts a tankless water heater. Estancia is an award winning community with great amenities. Get in touch with the outdoors with inspired amenity offerings that encourage an active and connected community lifestyle. This home is minutes away from wiregrass mall, Tampa Premium Outlets, and all the main shopping centers.30 MINUTE commute to downtown Tampa or the Tampa international airport and quick access to I-75. Schedule your private showing today and this home won’t last long!!!

description: *** Price Reduction ***  Centrally located in the heart of Deltona, this beautiful three bedroom, two bathroom home was built in 2002, has over 1500 square feet, is move-in ready and waiting for its new owners! As you drive up you will appreciate the lush greenery on the almost quarter of an acre lot, the spacious two car garage and the tasteful exterior paint. Inside there is an airy open concept floorplan, soaring high ceilings and a formal living & dining room offering plenty of options for entertaining. As you move forward you will find the spacious family room leading to the eat-in kitchen which features wooden cabinets, stainless steel appliances, a large breakfast bar, and a bonus dining area where you can drink your morning coffee and plan out your day. Tucked away you will find ample privacy in the master suite, featuring a massive walk-in closet and attached en-suite bathroom with a luxurious walk-in shower, you will have your own retreat away from the hustle and bustle of life. There are two more bedrooms which could easily be utilized as an in-home office, music, hobby room and offers space for sleepover guests! Outside you will love the peace and serenity you can find on the expansive, screened-in patio, the perfect spot for bird watching, barbecues on the weekends, with multiple spots for planting a garden and running around with the family dog in the partially fenced in backyard! Deltona Lakes is a NO HOA community conveniently located close to shopping, dining and so much more! Do not wait to check out this incredible home, call today to schedule a tour!

description:
CHARMING ARTS AND CRAFTS THREE BEDROOM GEM nestled on 3.3 acres suited for full time living or weekend getaway. Turn off a country road and immediately feel the serenity of this enchanted property. As you approach notice the stone veneer and majestic porch with the striking red metal roof that wraps the entire perimeter of the house. Walk the blue stone path flanked by perennial shrubs and flowers as you head toward front door. Enter the house and step onto meticulously maintained oak hardwood floors that flow seamlessly from the living space to the dining area and the light filled kitchen. In a cozy corner of the living room sits a wood stove creating a space where you can curl by the fire during the colder months. A bay window with streaming light fills the living and dining areas. In the kitchen the ceramic tile countertops and backsplash create an earthy warm feeling along with a large walk-in pantry, and stainless steel appliances. Gaze out the kitchen window situated above the custom hammered copper sink to the peaceful view of the back yard. There is a whimsical half bath near the kitchen with tiled floors and stain glass fixtures. The first floor also includes a bonus room used as an office/studio and a laundry/mud room that leads out to a meticulously maintained two car garage.
     Upstairs you will find three bedrooms and two full baths. The spacious ensuite has two walk-in closets and a luxurious bathroom with dual sinks, walk in shower and river rock tiles. 
     Make your way back downstairs out the french doors from the dining area to a back deck surrounded by blue hydrangeas with a view of the woods. Imagine enjoying your morning coffee on the outdoor porch listening to the birds surrounded by a Japanese maple and wild roses.  A stone patio invites an evening sit around the fire. 
      The property includes a fenced in yard and woods that extend beyond with old stone walls and rolling hills in this private setting. 
     Outdoor enthusiasts will love the proximity to nearby attractions such as Shawangunk Ridge Trail, Minnewaska State Park,  Sam's Point Area and Maratanza Lake. Brimstone Hill Vineyard and Winery is an 11 minute drive.  30 minutes to New Paltz, and 90 minutes to NYC
Come see this home and claim your slice of heaven in the Hudson Valley...

description: Do you, like most of us, view and binge on those home makeover shows? Those fixer-upper shows that show a home that has been turned from an ugly duckling into a beautiful swan? Well, here is a rare opportunity to purchase one of these makeover homes after it has become that beautiful swan! Built in 1993, the home is receiving a complete make-over by the top construction firm in the area. Because of this, current interior photos are not being displayed. These will be displayed as the home is remodeled.  New exterior siding, garage doors, landscaping overhaul, driveway refurbishing, and a complete dock makeover. By the way, all this is just for the exterior of the home. Inside, walls are coming down and the floor plan is being opened up. New floors, tile, paint, counter tops, cabinets, and appliances. You get the picture. A total make-over. Now, here is what doesn't have to be changed. The land. 1.21 acres of lakefront property. Most parcels in this community are considerably less than an acre. Not this one. Look at the aerial photos and see how the backyard dominates the surrounding homes. Large enough to add a swimming pool, gazebo, workshop, if you choose. You get the idea.  The property is perfectly angled towards the main channel of Cherokee Lake. So, you have year-round views of the water. And, as mentioned, it is dock-friendly, unlike some lakefront properties on TVA lakes that are not permitted to have a dock.  Hospitals & Walmart are less than 15 miles. Restaurants, malls, theaters, schools, and retail shops are nearby. Tennessee, a state that offers the advantage of NO State Income Tax and some of the lowest property tax rates in the nation. Four full, mild seasons, within a day's drive of most of the nation, and the Great Smoky Mountains in its backyard. You can have this and access to Cherokee Lake, with its world-renowned fishing, boating, and recreation activities by owning at a premier Cherokee Lake community. Live the Cherokee Lake Life!

description: This home is located on a quiet cul-de-sac, and surrounded by a community immersed in mature landscaping. Conveniently placed miles from both West Chester, and Downingtown Boroughs, this four bedroom, four and a half bath home provides a serene atmosphere one would expect in a home neighboring the Harmony Hill Nature Preserve. Take in your surroundings on either the front covered porch or the rear deck, which provides access to the great room and the first floor master suite. Once inside you'll be pleasantly surprised by the open ceilings in both the foyer, and the great room. While on the first floor of the home, you'll notice all floors are wood, a stone fireplace, and a minimum of thirty-six inch wide doorways. Following the four foot wide staircase to the second level, provides an option of going to any one of the three bedrooms. The master bedroom is accompanied by a walk-in closet, and a master bathroom. The two remaining bedrooms have access to a shared second floor bathroom. The walk-out finished basement has large windows to welcome the natural light. A stone fireplace, and a floor to ceiling height of nine feet six inches (floor to soffit height of eight feet and five inches). There are two bonus rooms without windows in the basement, which both have closets, a three piece bathroom and a large mixed use mechanical and storage room. Not only is the three car garage a nice feature to the home, but the doors are nine feet ten inches tall.

description: This 1216 square foot mobile / manufactured home has 3 bedrooms and 2.0 bathrooms. This home is located at 12010 Big Bend Rd, Riverview, FL 33579.
This is a 3416 square foot, single family home. This home is located at 11 Carriage Ln, Marlton, NJ 08053.

Looking For A Quality Home that your entire family will love and also located in a wonderful quiet community in the Highly Rated Upper Dublin School District? Then Look No Further and Head Over To This Wonderful Well Maintained 3 Story brick Colonial Home with 5-6 bedrooms and 4.5 baths, maintenance free exterior, freshly painted t/o, newer windows, newer Gas 2 zone HVAC system, recessed lights, wood floors and Pergo floors.  This residence is set on the Best and Largest Lot in this community and Just Steps away from the Bike & Walking Trail and you can also walk to Shopping, Restaurants and Starbucks. Greet your guests in the foyer with new floors and a beautiful double size glass French door which leads you into the spacious bright and cheery L/R with F/P and D/R with an  abundance of windows and an exterior French door leading you out to a wonderful brick patio where you can BBQ with family and friends. The oversized kitchen with new floors, newer top of the line S/Steel appliances, pantry. There is an adjacent breakfast room with a  newer and wider glass sliding door where you can view the beautiful outdoor environment. The open and airy  large great room has a full wall  brick fireplace, hardwood floors and a newer addition with a window wall of glass. The laundry room and powder room completes the 1st floor. The second story has a large loft, which makes for a perfect TV room or home office. A sensational MBR suite has vaulted ceilings, a grand master bath with marble floors, jacuzzi tub, steam shower, 2 designer pedestal sinks, and a unique juliette balcony with a Trex deck where you can relax and enjoy your morning coffee and the adjacent exercise room is a plus.  There is a princess suite with private bath and an additional large bedroom and hall bath.  The third story has an additional bonus room with two study centers, two other good sized bedrooms, and a great large ceramic tile master bath. The basement is finished with unique flooring and a custom built in media area. There is tons of storage and a cedar closet, plus a two car garage.

description: Back on the Market.  Price Reduced!  LARGE Single Story Home Located in Lovely, Gated Victoria Grove. Floor Plan is Open but Maintains the Feeling of Coziness at the Same Time. Tile & Carpet Floors Thru Out; Tall Ceilings & Plantation Shutters in the Living Spaces.  Family Room is Open to the Roomy Kitchen with Island, Double Door Pantry, Loads of Cabinets and Yards of Counter Space.  Gas Fireplace & Built In Entertainment Niche in Family Room with Slider to Patio. This Home Features 4 Large Bedrooms, 2.5 Bathrooms, and a Homework or Craft Room. The Private Master Bedroom Suite is on One Side of the House and the Other Bedrooms are in a Separate Wing.  Master Bathroom is Features a Separate Tub & Shower, Vanity & Huge Walk In Closet.  Indoor Laundry Leads to the 2 Car Garage, while the 3rd Car Space has a Separate Entry.  A Breezy Front Porch Greets you as you approach the Entry, You Just Need a Couple of Rocking Chairs and Some Soft Music to make your Relaxation Complete.  Back Yard Has a Fire pit and Patio Between the Master Bedroom and Family Room With Plenty of Room for A Pool.   Low Tax Rate of Approximately 1.29%, including $1269 CDF. Lake Mathews Elementary School is Just a Couple of Blocks Away and was a "National Blue Ribbon School" & is the Highest Rated Elementary School in the RUSD.  The Victoria Grove Community Includes Fenced Pool & Spa, Security Patrols, Multiple Playgrounds, Baseball & Soccer Fields & Picnic Areas.  Proximity to Both the 91 & 15 Freeways.

description: Welcome to 319 S. Redwood Drive, Mankato! Great Home, Great Location, Great Space! Check out this wonderful Hilltop home that features 4 BR, 2 BA. Step inside the home and be greeted by a large entryway with tiled floors. The living room/dining room area is spacious and features wood floors. Both living and dining room feature a bow window let lots of natural sunlight to shine up the space. The kitchen has some newer appliances, tile backsplash, and a cute buffet/coffee bar area with good storage. Access to the deck, patio with fenced in area, and backyard is located off the kitchen. On the upper level is 3 nice size bedrooms all with wood floors and a full bathroom. The lower level features the 4th bedroom which would be the perfect spot to set up your home office. Laundry, 3/4 bathroom and access to the attached garage complete this level. Basement: family room with new carpet, gas stand alone fireplace, workshop and storage area. Outside: metal siding, deck, paver patio, additional parking pad, storage shed.

description: Seller says get it Sold! Drastically reduced for Quick Sale. Sensational sprawling Rancher with elegant entry foyer that separates the living and resting areas. The eat-in kitchen features rich cabinetry, granite counter tops, newer appliances, recessed lighting and a large pantry cabinet. The formal dining and living rooms have pegged hardwood floors and custom accent lighting, the family room has a built-in entertainment console, additional eating area, 2nd stairs to the basement and full bath for the pool area. All of the bedrooms are on the opposite end of the house have an abundance of closets and accent lighting. The master Bedroom has 4 double closets, dressing area and full bath. The finished basement consists of a bedroom suite (In-Law or Au-Pair), office or storage area, finished recreation room with huge stone fireplace and an outside exit. The grounds are just breathtaking with a covered patio, fantastic in-ground pool and green house. Property needs updating, being sold "AS IS"!

You have to come by and see this beautiful Two Master Bedrooms with Two and a half baths. Easy-living that you'll be proud to call home with a bright kitchen, casual dining area off kitchen , living room with fireplace for those cool, desert winter nights. 
Completely renovated with beautiful new hardwood floors, paint, plantation blinds. private patio. 

This is NOT apartment living instead a quiet residential neighborhood.

All appliances included. Community pool.

Amazing location, high demanded zip code 85254 and just minutes from the 101 and Mayo Medical Campus. Shopping: Desert Ridge, Kierland, Scottsdale Quarter.

Owner pays for HOA dues, includes water, trash, sewer. Refundable security payment spread over the first three months.

description: This is a 1862 square foot, single family home. This home is located at 1837 W Point Dr, Cherry Hill, NJ 08003.

Tenant in place, showings will resume starting November 20th.

Exceptional Six-Story Townhouse on the premier block in Manhattan

10 Bank was recently completed from top to bottom with a gut renovation that created a modern home with an amazing living space, elevator access to all six levels, and uses top-of-the-line Control4 throughout to operate lights, sound system, shades, and climate.

This grand and elegant, 6-story (plus finished basement) single-family townhouse is the ultimate residence for comfortable living. For those in search of the perfect and move-in ready to call home, and does not require its new owners to endure years of renovations.

At approximately 15+ SQFT wide and close to 4000 square feet including the basement, turnkey smart home, this sun-filled home offers 5 possible bedrooms, 4 full bathrooms, and 3 powder rooms.

PARLOR FLOOR:
The grand and elegant entry foyer leads to a fireplace, sitting area, powder room, and elevator servicing all six floors. The hallway extends to a large eat-in kitchen with custom cabinetry, Wolf and Subzero appliances, a white Marble Island, marble countertops, and backsplashes with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the garden.

SECOND FLOOR:
The spacious landing leads to an elegant formal dining room with southern exposure, custom cabinetries, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the garden. The hallway extends to the extraordinary Atelier living room, a magical room of epic proportions with 8-foot tall ceilings and a wood-burning fireplace. Also on this floor are a temperature-controlled wine room and a wet bar. A powder room is located between these two grand rooms.

THIRD FLOOR:
This entire floor is dedicated to the Primary Bedroom Suite with its large, south-facing windows, and includes an en-suite bathroom bathed in natural light and splendidly finished with Calcutta marble, Waterworks Henry fixtures, a Polished nickel Drummonds tub, twin vanities. Masses of closet space connect the bedroom and bathroom.

FOURTH FLOOR:
This floor contains two secondary bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms and custom-fitted closets.

FIFTH FLOOR:
There is an additional bedroom with an en-suite bathroom, a media/theater room with a large skylight that floods the room with natural light, and a powder room.

ROOFTOP:
Features a large seating area with superb open, protected views to the south overlooking Downtown and Manhattan.

GARDEN FLOOR:
At the end of the hallway is the recreation/office that leads out onto the large, south-facing, landscaped garden followed by a powder room, butler's pantry, full laundry room as well as house mechanicals

10 Bank Street exudes everything a townhouse should; multiple outdoor spaces, an elevator, an array of bedrooms, and an abundance of entertaining spaces. Often regarded as the premier block in Manhattan, the tree-lined street is in close proximity to the finest schools, shopping, and restaurants the city has to offer.

Tenant in place until October 2021. Rent is $58,000 per month.

description: This charming 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom colonial is well maintained and has so much to offer. The gourmet kitchen has beautiful custom cherry cabinets, a center island, and granite counter tops. The bright dining room has a lovely built-in custom cherry hutch and cherry wainscoting. The family room has a stone fireplace, wide pine floors, and a door that leads to a screened in, maintenance free, porch and the large level side yard. Full bath on the first floor! This home is equipped with central vac and lots of closet space!  The master bedroom has wide pine flooring. The second floor bathroom has a great jetted tub and the laundry is also located on the second floor.  The two car garage has an unfinished room above for extra storage or could be finished for extra living space.  This property has a separate barn with its own power, and an unfinished room above it for even more storage!  There is a beautiful flagstone patio off the back of the home that opens to the large, private backyard.

description: This private retreat is tucked away in a quiet neighborhood on a peaceful ?3.9 acre wooded lot! Freshly updated inside with new paint, carpet, flooring, bathrooms, and granite counters. With 3 bedrooms, 2 full baths, and a versatile upstairs bonus room, perfect for an office or kids' play area, there is ample space for the whole family. This unique property provides plenty of room for outdoor recreation and a patio to relax with so much space!

description: Welcome home to your fully remodeled dream home in sought-after Rippon Landing! This beautiful property has three spacious bedrooms and two full bathrooms on the upper level, a convenient half bathroom on the main level, and an additional full bedroom/office and full bathroom in the walk-out lower level. Not only has this home been fully updated with a new kitchen and all new bathrooms, but all the electrical has been updated, including a new electrical panel and recessed lighting . A new HVAC and hot water heater are also being installed!  With plenty of natural light pouring in, you'll love spending time in the spacious living room and enjoying the deck that's just off it. The backyard is fully fenced in, providing a perfect spot for outdoor entertaining or simply relaxing on a lazy Sunday afternoon. The lower level is fully finished with a great rec room, full bathroom, and an additional bedroom/office. For added convenience, a washer and dryer are included in the unit, and there are two assigned parking spaces included as well. Did I mention that all the flooring is new, including LVP in the main and lower levels, and new carpet on the upper levels? This home truly has it all and is just waiting for you to make it yours. Schedule your showing today and see for yourself what makes this Woodbridge gem so special!

description: Enchanting year-round cottage on over an ACRE of beautiful land located on outer Ocean Avenue/Moody Point.  This special property is sited on one of the largest lots in the neighborhood and directly abuts the Rachel Carson Wildlife Refuge offering great privacy and pleasant distant views. This unique offering consists of an all-season home with two/three bedrooms AND an unfinished adjacent guest house with generous square footage. Bring your creativity to the table and finish the guest house to your own style and taste.  The main house exudes warmth and charm and is move-in ready. Perfect set up for friends and extended family with a finished lower level. New mini split units provide fantastic cooling in the summer and heat in the colder months. Terrific outdoor space with a sizeable deck directly off of the living space. The property has a secluded feel with its long driveway coming off of Ocean Avenue. There is ample parking for several vehicles. Stroll to the rocky coast in just a few minutes or take an easy ten minute walk to the sands of either Moody or Crescent Beach! Easy access to casual and fine dining, shops, galleries, recreation.  The popular seaside towns of Ogunquit and Kennebunkport are just a few miles away.  Enjoy the property yourself and/or take advantage of the desirable location and high demand for rental property in the area.  The opportunities are limitless!

description: Do you want a perfect location on the Metcalf Bottoms entrance road to The Great Smoky Mountains National Park, on a flat lot and lots of parking. If so this could be the place for you. Large 6 bedroom cabin with endless possibilities. 3 bedrooms on the lower level and a complete 3 bedroom living quarters upstairs with additional kitchen and living room. Electric fireplace upstairs and gas fireplace downstairs. Owners do not use the gas fireplace so no propane tank is on property at this time. Beautiful view of Roundtop Mountain and the Foothills of the Smokies. Come and bring you ideas of making this into a mountain retreat. You could rent this as two separate units or make it one whole unit. There is even room to park your RV around back. Remember so many possibilities with this property! The lower level was a needle shop store in the past.   According to the Zoning Resolutions for Sevier County Article IV, sect 401, this property could be used as a Customary Home Occupation.  Which can include Professional offices, Daycare, Beauty Barber Shop, Antique Sales, educational instruction or for arts/crafts made by owners.  So live upstairs and work downstairs.  Please verify all matters of what businesses are allowed with the Sevier County Zoning office. The large storage building out front will not stay with the property, but the small one in the back will stay.

The finished basement has an additional family room and a utility room with great potential for a second kitchen. The breathtaking year-round mountain views cannot be captured in a photo - you must see them in person! A new whole-house generator was recently installed and new HVAC within the last year.

description: Be the first owners of this beautiful new construction in the newest phase of Thornewood, one of Mahomet's most popular subdivisions.  This 2-story home boasts five bedrooms, 4 full baths, and 3,146 finished sqft of living space.  The great room, dining area, and kitchen is the perfect combination of space for day-to-day living as well as entertaining.  White shaker cabinets w/ custom white oak stained island, marble-look quartz countertops, tiled backsplash and a GE stainless steel appliance package welcome you when it's time for meal prep.  The first-floor bedroom or office with a full bath will be great for guests or the perfect secluded space to get work/studies done.  The second-floor primary suite features a full en-suite bath with a custom tiled shower and a large walk-in closet.  Two additional bedrooms, loft area and the laundry room with utility sink complete the upper level. Take advantage of the additional living space in the basement featuring a spacious family/rec room, fifth bedroom and full bath.  The drop zone w/ lockers off the three-car attached garage is the perfect space for your stuff.  High-efficiency HVAC equipment & water heater plus many more efficient designs throughout.  Owner is a licensed broker.  Call today!

The eat in kitchen has just been completely remodeled with brand new cabinetry and countertops. New appliances...  There is a laundry room with a large closet on this floor as well. Upstairs is the main owners suite with private updated bath. Two additional bedrooms are serviced by the completely redone hall bath. The full basement is already framed out for you to finish as you would like. This community features a pool and playground. Close proximity to shopping, restaurants, and entertainment in Skippack, Plymouth Meeting, and Blue Bell, as well as the PA Turnpike,  and Routes 73 and 202. Unpack your bags and move right into carefree HOA living!

description: Mountain Retreat with a river flowing past!  Custom Owner/Builder home shows pride of ownership everywhere!  Custom woodworking through-out, 2x6 and 2x8' walls, so very energy efficient.  All season room provides an ideal spot for that hot tub and enjoying the spectacular views.  Additional Guest house offers additional 1,242 +/- sq.ft for entertaining or as extra income!  Plenty of storage. The laundry/hobby/craft room will be sure to please.  Covered wrap-around deck provides more space for relaxing and entertaining.  Grounds are immaculate and there is a wonderful, separate garden space for those with a green thumb and a wish for fresh veggies!  Hamilton Branch, just beyond back gate, offers excellent year round fly fishing opportunities and Lake Almanor is just 3 miles away! This needs to be seen to appreciate all the many amenities that make this such a special property.  Shown by Appointment.

description: Welcome to this stunning 5 bedroom - 4 bath "like new" home with an open floor plan perfect for modern living! This home features all-new crown molding throughout that enhances the elegance of the home! Enter with a covered front porch with visual columns. Upon entering, you will be greeted by a spacious family room with gorgeous hardwood flooring complete with a stacked stone ventless fireplace with beautiful surround that creates a cozy atmosphere perfect for relaxing with family and friends. The kitchen boasts a large island perfect for entertaining, more gorgeous hardwood floors, a walk-in pantry, modern stainless steel appliances and ample cabinet space. The master suite is conveniently located on the main level including an en suite with double vanity areas, tiled shower, separate soaking tub and a sizable walk-in closet. The main level also boasts of a second bedroom usable for family, guests or as an office - with a full bathroom. The laundry room is also convenient on this main level with shelving. Upstairs, you will discover 3 more bedrooms each with plenty of closet space, one with its own private bath and then a secondary full bathroom. There is an open TV/game area that is ideal for family/kids/friends. The covered outdoor patio is an oasis of its own featuring a stacked stone fireplace with hearth, custom outdoor kitchen, bar area, and second TV for added convenience, making it the perfect spot to relax and unwind or entertain, especially with lake views in winter time. This home also features an additional exterior storage room with crown molding that could be used as an office, studio, gym or extra storage space. The 2-car garage provides convenience and ample room for parking and storage. With its prime location and luxurious features, this home is perfect for those looking for a comfortable and stylish living experience. Don't miss out on the opportunity to make this beautiful home your own!

description: This 1861 square foot single family home has 4 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms. This home is located at 720 Bluejay Cir, Elk Grove Village, IL 60007.

Welcome to your dream home in the Traditions Neighborhood! This spacious and well-designed ranch style home offers the perfect blend of comfort and style. Boasting 3 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms, this house provides space for both relaxation & entertainment.
Step into the heart of the home, where a large open kitchen awaits. Ideal for culinary enthusiasts or social gatherings, the kitchen features modern appliances, sleek countertops, and abundant storage. The seamless flow into the dining and living areas are perfect for family dinners or hosting friends.
The living room, designed for both comfort and entertainment, is pre-wired for surround sound. It's a great place to enjoy a movie night or listen to your favorite music.
The private Primary Suite is a true retreat, offering tranquility and comfort. With a spacious layout and 5-piece en-suite bathroom, it provides the perfect sanctuary to unwind after a long day. The two additional bedrooms and bathrooms ensure plenty of space for family or guests to enjoy everyday living.
For those who work from home or require a dedicated workspace, this home includes a stylish and functional office. Whether you need a quiet place for focused productivity or a comfortable spot for virtual meetings, the dedicated office space meets your professional needs. The expansive basement presents an exciting opportunity for customization. Transform it into a home gym, entertainment area, or additional living space—let your imagination run wild.
The Traditions neighborhood offers a sense of community, with nearby parks, shopping, and dining options at Southlands Mall. It is also conveniently located near E-470, I-70, Buckley Space Force Base, the Anschutz campus, and so much more.
Do not miss the opportunity to make this exceptional ranch-style home yours. Experience the perfect blend of modern living and traditional charm in the sought-after Traditions neighborhood. Schedule a showing today and envision the home you've been waiting for!

description: From the road you can not see this house! When you enter you cannot help feeling like you just walked into your vacation home! There is nothing else like this for sale in CT. description: STOP THE CAR! This one is a Beauty! You will love this beautifully restored farmhouse. All of the original charm has been preserved while adding modern touches. From the original glass knobs, boxlocks, cast iron tub, original hardwood floors, to the beams on the front porch! This home has been redone from top to bottom with New Windows, New Doors, Fresh Paint Throughout, New Carpet, New Central AC, New Garage Roof...the list goes on. The min you walk in you will fall in love with the classic yet modern feel. Walk thru the breathtaking kitchen with all stainless steel appliances, white quartz countertops, porcelain tile backsplash and custom lighting. Continue through the back of the house to the enormous Mud Room, with ample space for wiping wet feet or paws. Bonus first floor laundry space and half bath. And would you look at the flooring? The Luxury vinyl tile is extremely durable and water proof. Walk up the stairs to the 2nd floor with plush new carpet in all of the bedrooms, huge cedar lined hallway closet, and full bath. The Full Bath has a porcelain and mirrored tiled shower along with a custom vanity surrounding the original porcelain sink. Continue in the 3rd bedroom to an added bonus space in the attic. with an additional 250 sq ft it would be the perfect lounge, office space or play room.  Wait until you see the outside! The oversized 2 car garage has a brand new roof, the shed which was originally a chicken coop could be additional garden storage and then move on to the Barn! This Barn was once home to horses but can now be used for storage or entertaining...the possibilities are endless. This unique property has been thoughtfully crafted and is ready for a new owner to call it HOME.

description:
Split level home with 3BR/2 BA, two living areas, dishwasher, washer/dryer, and 1 car garage (storage only). No smoking property. Pets not allowed.

Minimum Rental Requirements: Verifiable monthly income must be 3 times monthly rent. Good credit rating a must. No evictions & must have 2 yrs of recent good verifiable rental history.
Minimum security deposit: $1,900 - maximum deposit: $3,800

A great combination of privacy and beauty, this home is in A+ move in condition. Located in pristine North Bedford County near Sedalia Center, this home is perched perfectly above the pond for mountain views. A cozy place to be in all seasons, the AEP electric bills are low and the house is insulated well with 6''walls, added insulation and double paned casement windows. Attached two car garage makes for easy living and organization. Anyone looking for sustainable living, this is the place. Wonderful garden space between the 22x14 greenhouse (w/ water and electric) and pond. Chicken coop in place. Lots of mature Poplar, timber value on the property. New 40 year roof and well pump - 2003. New siding with added insulation - 2010. House is 2/3 stone, 1/3 frame and siding. New metal roof on screened 15x11 gazebo with swing by pond. 40x24 shop with two open bays, one closed; tools and equipment negotiable. Property in land use w/ low annual taxes. Deeded no mobile homes. Well landscaped

description: Classic 2 story 4 bed/3 bath in sought after Estates at Lake Chesterfield. Dramatic 2-story foyer with hardwood floors creates a grand impression into this light filled home. description: Welcome to the desirable destination community of Chestnut Creek! Start with the pretty sidewalk leading from the 2-car garage to the front door where you'll find a screen door to leave open and create a great cross breeze! This home was renovated in 2020 to include new luxury plank vinyl floors in the Great room and dining room. A completely reconfigured Great room, kitchen set up and all new stainless steel Applicances and washer/dryer. The cook will love the center island and updated cabinets with lots of storage. There's also a pantry and a wet bar for even more cupboard and shelving space. Off the great room you will find a half bath for guest use and a generous size master bedroom with sliders to the lanai and a private bathroom that features double sinks, a walk-in shower and separate tub plus a private commode room and huge walk-in closet. On the other side of the house, you will find 2 guest bedrooms with a jack-n-jill bathroom that serves both rooms. The huge inside laundry room could also serve as a home office with lots of storage and washer/dryer new in 2020. The two car garage has a Nitch that makes a great workshop area. This home boasts over 2200 sqft and is maintenance free meaning you have more time to enjoy the Florida lifestyle. The screened lanai has a privacy hedge in back and is just steps to the clubhouse and community pool beyond the clubhouse. It's like having your own pool without the expense and maintenance. The low monthly maintenance fee takes care of the lawncare, landscaping, irrigation, basic cable and pool maintenance. Chestnut Creek master association takes care of the lovely lake in the middle of the neighborhood with sidewalk all the way around, great for walking and watching the wildlife.  You won't want to miss this rarely available maintenance free single family home!

description: This home is ALL THAT and two peach trees! Welcome to 605 Sunset Ave in Maple Shade. This home is deceiving from outside because it offers a ton of interior living space and newer features throughout that any buyer will truly enjoy. As you pull up you'll notice the newer roof & gutters gracing the exterior. Walking inside you step onto refinished hardwood flooring in a bright front living room. There are two bedrooms off to the left also with refinished hardwood floors and neutral tone paint. There is also a full bathroom here with custom tilework and a tub shower. Make your way into the updated kitchen where you'll be sure to discover the chef in you. The kitchen features tile flooring, grey cabinetry, granite countertops and a stainless steel appliance package including a refrigerator, gas range, microwave & dishwasher. The kitchen has another pass through leading to a large, cozy family room at the back of the house. This room is spacious & inviting with a gas fireplace, closet space, access to the attached garage, access to the laundry room & half bath as well as a door leading to the backyard. The backyard is HUGE with tons of space for gardening, activities and fur baby play. The backyard is fully fenced, has a hardscaping patio for entertainment & 2 growing peach trees for delicious enjoyment. Upstairs you will find 2 more bedrooms, one with a walk in closet, as well as a second full bathroom. There is a full unfinished basement which offers ample amounts of dry storage. HVAC system 3 years old. This home is fully move in ready with every sense of the phrase. Do not delay - schedule your tour ASAP to see this beauty!

description: Build the luxurious Charlestown model on limited homesites now, while only a few remain! Enclave at Ridgewood is now booking the final Carriage Series: New Luxury Carriage Style Townhomes that live like singles in the Spring-ford School District. With up to 2,800 sq. ft. and a 4th bedroom option, the Charlestown is like no other home you will find. Discover a thriving community of character and distinction brought to life by Rouse Chamberlin Homes. Enter the Charlestown two story foyer bathed in natural light from above. The adjoining study is the ideal space to work from home. The gourmet kitchen boasts a wall oven, built-in microwave, and 5 burner gas cooktop with hood vent. A full size pantry closet provides plenty of storage. The large kitchen island is a key feature for both cooks and company. Loved ones will gather in a bright spacious great room or mingle in the casual dining area with a sunny slider to the low maintenance deck included. An optional sunroom extension is also available.  An elegant oak staircase leads to the spacious second level with 9 foot ceilings as a standard feature on both first and second floors. Treat yourself to an owners bedroom suite with dual walk-in closets, cozy sitting area, and luxurious bath. Large secondary bedrooms are at the end of a bright center hallway. There is a second floor laundry and bath. Plan now for your move in 2022 and design your new home with your favorite personal selections for kitchen and bath, flooring and more. Create a home uniquely your own at our exclusive Design Studio. Take advantage of an easy come and go lifestyle where grounds keeping and snow removal are provided. You can relax under our 1 year, 2 year and 10 year warranties and local customer service. Stay fit just minutes away at the Spring Valley YMCA and swim any day of the year! Enclave at Ridgewood borders over 88 acres of township open space, future park, and walking paths, yet is perfectly located just 1.8 miles from Route 422 at Royersford, only minutes from every shopping need from Collegeville to Limerick. The new Carriage Series homesites are selling from the on-site sales office at 300 Ridgewood Drive. The Sales Center is Open Thursday- Monday BY PRIVATE APPOINTMENT from 11:00-5:00PM. Visit the builders website, call or email today for appointment. Photos show various model homes which may differ. Experience why a Rouse Chamberlin Home brings loved ones together!

What a great buy on this brick home and the seller pays $5,000 toward all closing costs and/or prepaid items!!! SAVE YOUR CASH!!! Don't let the age fool you-this home has been updated in 2006/2007: new carpet & vinyl throughout, new cabinets and counter tops in the kitchen, new vanities in the bathrooms! The main house was built in 1968, with the Master Bathroom, Laundry Room, and Porch/Carport addition completed in 2007. Open floor plan with a large Living Room and Dining Area. Master Bedroom Suite has an oversized double vanity, 2 closets and accesses the Laundry Room with additional storage/closet space. The 12x20 Porch could easily be used as a Carport with a side entry by removing the deck. Privacy fenced, level back yard, is a great place for the kids to play! The drive thru gate makes it easy to bring your boat or RV in the back yard! Take a look today!

Wonderful single level home in the Villas at Dublin Ranch! This rare end-unit Cezanne model is the only 3 bedroom plan in the community. This north-facing townhouse-style condo features 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, private patio, attached 2 car garage & great views of the park. The unique floorplan combines the living room, dining room and kitchen together to create a great room perfect for modern-day living. Kitchen includes a huge island, SS appliances, cherry cabinets and recessed lighting while the living room is highlighted by the elegant gas fireplace & surround sound system. The primary suite offers an office nook, walk-in closet & spacious bathroom w/ double sinks, soaking tub, & walk-in shower… while 2 more spacious bedrooms, a full bathroom, and the convenient laundry closet are located on the other side of the home. Resort style living with beautiful community pool, spa, gym & club house. Close to parks, restaurants, & shopping with easy access to BART, 580/680.
